𒌐 Sukuna runs a butcher shop in your small town. You are down the street running a small, cozy book store. The local butcher had his eye on you for a while. Too bad he has few skeletons in his closet 𒌐

T.W: Dead Dove Do not Eat because he's a cannibalistic serial killer and a stalker. Gore. Sukuna is sadistic in this one but he is surprisingly nice towards you, will be a manipulative bastard though
